system.flavor: Spikes of iron whip from the earth, piercing the limbs of your foes.
system.effect:
Attack: 2 piercing damage. On hit: +1d6 piercing.
Area effect: 2 piercing damage
On hit one (4+) two or (6+) three spaces of dangerous terrain in free space in the area.
Heavy character touching the edge of the burst, both inside and outside the area, takes 1d3+1 piercing damage again.
